# Professional Summary
Description: Development Engineer at Wavemaker building React runtime and code generation infrastructure for scalable app exports. Previously shipped Rava AI from zero to production across frontend, backend, DevOps, and AI integrations.

# Technical Skills
Frontend: React, Next.js, TailwindCSS, TypeScript, Redux
Backend: Node.js, FastAPI, Python
Databases: MongoDB, Prisma, Firebase
Cloud & DevOps: Docker, GCP, Firebase, CI/CD pipelines
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, C++
Tools: Git, Browser optimization, Embedding systems

# Professional Experience
Current Role: Development Engineer at Wavemaker (January 2025 - Present)
- Contributes to the React runtime engine powering Wavemaker Studio
- Builds code generation pipelines that export maintainable React applications from visual studio definitions
- Works on platform infrastructure for low-code application rendering and scalable app exports

Previous Role: Software Engineer at Rava AI (January 2024 - December 2024)
- Developed automated content workflows and embedding systems for diverse content types
- Implemented browser caching optimizations reducing server load by 40%
- Established CI/CD pipelines improving deployment speed by 70%
- Built personalized content generation features serving 1000+ customers based on user personas

Previous Role: Full Stack Developer at SkillRazr (October 2023 - December 2023)
- Engineered interactive Git and SQL learning platforms utilizing GCP and Firebase
- Implemented responsive design principles to optimize cross-device functionality
- Led UI/UX improvements across the platform ecosystem

# Notable Projects
Collab - Trello-like Application:
- GitHub: https://github.com/yagyaraj234/collab
- Live: https://collab-neon.vercel.app/
- Features: Organization management, multiple boards per organization, task management with status updates and due dates
- Integrated Stripe for payment processing and subscription management
